image_prompt.prompt: Ultra photorealistic raw iPhone mirror selfie of a young Japanese woman in her early 20s standing in a modern minimalist bedroom. She has long jet-black hair falling past her shoulders in natural straight strands, parted slightly off-center. Fitness hourglass figure with ample chest, toned core, wide hips, and thick thighs — natural body proportions with real skin texture and visible pores. She wears a fitted cream-colored ribbed spaghetti-strap bodysuit tucked into high-waisted light-wash wide-leg denim jeans. Simple gold thin hoop earrings and a delicate gold layered chain necklace visible at the collarbone. One hand holds an iPhone 15 Pro Max at chest height, the other rests lightly on her hip with fingers slightly curled. Her weight shifts to her right leg creating a subtle hip tilt left, body angled at a slight three-quarter angle toward the mirror. She gazes at the phone screen with an effortlessly relaxed expression and barely-there soft smile, eyes calm and confident. The room has a clean white-painted wall behind a large frameless full-length mirror leaning against the wall, light grey hardwood floor, a white linen-covered bed partially visible on the right edge of frame with a knit throw draped over the corner. Natural warm morning sunlight streams from a wide window to the right, casting soft warm highlights across her left side and a gentle directional shadow along the mirror frame. Soft ivory, clean white, warm gold, pale denim color palette. Effortless everyday influencer aesthetic. Shot at eye-level in portrait orientation, centered composition with slight three-quarter body framing. Photorealistic, high quality, high resolution, 9:16 aspect ratio.

image_prompt.prompt: Ultra photorealistic fashion lifestyle photo of a young Japanese woman in her early 20s standing confidently at the edge of a sunlit rooftop terrace in a modern urban setting. She has long dark brown hair styled in a sleek low ponytail tied with a thin black ribbon, face fully framed. Fitness hourglass figure with ample chest, toned core, wide hips, and thick thighs visible through her outfit. Light-medium neutral smooth skin, naturally expressive features. She wears a structured caramel-colored leather blazer over a simple thin white ribbed turtleneck, tailored black high-waisted straight-leg trousers, and pointed black ankle boots. A minimal gold watch on her left wrist. She stands in a relaxed but intentional contrapposto pose — right hip pushed out slightly, left foot stepped forward, both hands loosely in blazer pockets. She looks directly into the camera with a steady, quietly confident expression — chin level, lips lightly pressed together in a natural closed-lip expression, eyes holding strong contact. The rooftop has a clean concrete railing behind her with an open city skyline stretching in the distance, glass and steel buildings catching the late-afternoon light. Potted olive trees in matte white planters flank her on each side. Golden afternoon sunlight from the left side casts warm side lighting across her face and jacket, a sharp shadow falling to her right, and a warm ambient glow in the cityscape background. Caramel brown, crisp white, deep black, muted gold, sky grey color palette. Modern editorial lifestyle aesthetic. Third-person shot at eye-level, three-quarter body framing, vertical portrait composition centered with slight negative space above. Photorealistic, high quality, high resolution, 4:5 aspect ratio.

image_prompt.prompt: Ultra photorealistic raw iPhone mirror selfie of a young Japanese woman in her early 20s standing in a sleek modern bathroom with a wide frameless mirror above a white floating vanity. She has long dark brown hair loosely half-up — the top half clipped back in a tortoiseshell claw clip, the bottom half falling in soft natural waves past her shoulders. Fitness hourglass figure with ample chest, toned core, wide hips, and thick thighs. Light-medium neutral smooth skin with natural texture. She wears a fitted dark sage green zip-up athletic set — a cropped zip-up hoodie with the zipper pulled halfway down, and matching high-waisted biker shorts. White no-show ankle socks visible at the bottom. She stands slightly angled away from the vanity, using its mirror to take the selfie — left hand holding the iPhone at shoulder height angled slightly down to capture full body, right hand on the countertop edge. She looks at her phone screen with a playful, just-rolled-out-of-bed casual expression — lips pressed in a relaxed smirk, one brow subtly raised. The bathroom has white subway tile walls, chrome fixtures, a white floating vanity with a small round succulent in a terracotta pot and a neatly folded off-white hand towel on the counter edge. Warm overhead recessed lighting gives a clean bright fill, with a secondary warm accent light from a small LED vanity light strip above the mirror adding soft warmth to her face. Clean white, sage green, warm chrome, off-white linen color palette. Casual athleisure morning routine aesthetic. Shot at eye-level in portrait orientation, mirror selfie POV, full body framing. Photorealistic, high quality, high resolution, 9:16 aspect ratio.

posts.notes: Variant A: mirror selfie style — casual bathroom mirror shot, athleisure outfit, natural morning setting. grok_interactive post at US evening prime (21:00 UTC). Grok request asks to swap outfit to red — drives visual transformation engagement. Sage green outfit makes the color contrast with hypothetical red version striking.

image_prompt.prompt: Ultra photorealistic lifestyle photo of a young Japanese woman in her early 20s standing in a bright modern walk-in closet trying on an outfit. She has long jet-black hair styled in a sleek high bun with a few face-framing strands left loose at her temples. Fitness hourglass figure with ample chest, toned core, wide hips, and thick thighs. Light-medium neutral smooth skin. She wears a fitted sleeveless charcoal grey ribbed midi dress with a slight cowl neckline that drapes softly over her chest, the fabric falling close to her curves down to mid-calf. Minimal thin gold chain anklet on her right ankle. She stands facing a rod of hanging clothes with her body turned three-quarters toward the camera, right arm extended reaching toward the clothes rack and lightly pulling at a hanger with two fingers, left arm hanging naturally at her side. She glances over her left shoulder directly at the camera with a slightly amused look — lips barely parted in a quiet smirk, eyes wide and direct. The closet has clean white painted walls, a double clothing rod filled with neatly organized garments sorted by color, open white shelving on the left side with folded knitwear and stacked shoe boxes, a full-length mirror on the far wall reflecting the back of her outfit, and a plush round cream ottoman in the center of the floor. Soft natural daylight from a frosted glass ceiling panel diffuses evenly throughout the space. Charcoal grey, clean white, muted warm cream, minimal gold color palette. Effortless closet styling aesthetic. Third-person shot at eye-level, three-quarter body framing, vertical portrait composition. Photorealistic, high quality, high resolution, 4:5 aspect ratio.
